description: NORTHWESTERN BELL TELE PHONE ANNUAL REPORT A review of the company perform ance during 1956 and a look at the newest scientific developments are in the annual report of Northwestern Bell Telephone Company The report states Telephone increased m the five states served by 107000 and totaled 2 030000 by years end Construction program amounted to 81 million15 million more than previous year Dial operation was extended to I 7 exchanges Plant additions also included 102 new buildings or building additions 276000 miles of exchange circuits and 35000 miles of long distance cir cuits 39000 residence extension telepho nes were added The company has the highest farm telephone usage of any similar area in the country NEW INVENTIONS Among the new developments the report describes data processing which with the transmission work per formed by telephone services enables machines to talk to other machines Data processing the report says grows out of the increasing use of electronic computers or socalled electronic brain equipment Another new service is telemeter ing which transmit information such as pressures rates of flow and other measurements from instruments at re mote locations to central control points Other new things being worked upon and which will
